es.name: Ratio Precio/Beneficio (P/E)
es.description: Calcula el múltiplo P/E de una acción.
es.seo_description: Calcula el caudal de agua, la caida de presion y el dimensionado de tuberias para sistemas de fontaneria. Esencial para diseno de suministro de agua.
es.example_label: Calculating P/E ratio for stock trading at $145 with earnings per share of $8.75.
es.result_context: The pe of {pe}x shows how many dollars investors pay per dollar of earnings.
es.formula_display: P/E Ratio = Share Price ÷ Earnings Per Share

steps.calculation: Investors pay $16.57 for each $1 of earnings

mistakes: Comparing P/E ratios across different industries without context
Using P/E for companies with negative or distorted earnings
Not considering growth rate when evaluating P/E (use PEG ratio)
